subcodes.first_line: O friends and kindred of him who hath ascended unto God! Now is the time for hearts to stir and souls to cry out, and for ears to hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و خویشان آن متصاعد الی الله هنگام جوش دلهاست و خروش جانها و استماع
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @eulogies; reminiscences
